name: PR Review
prompt: Check this repo for open pull requests. For each PR that has no review or has new commits since the last review, summarize the changes, flag any issues, and post a review comment. Skip PRs I authored.
preflight: command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1 && gh pr list --state open --json number --jq length 2>/dev/null | grep -q '[1-9]'
